title: transport: auth success accepted when relay omits result field
description: ws_upgrade_and_auth checks resp.error then enters 'if let Some(result) = &resp.result'. If both are None (relay sends {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":N} with neither result nor error), the pub_id sanity check is silently skipped and the function returns Ok. A rogue relay can suppress the result field to prevent the client from verifying that the relay registered it under the expected pub_id, then route traffic for the client to an arbitrary identity slot. Fix: bail if resp.result is None after confirming no error.
